title: Steady beta full-arc signoff
summary: Close the big beta-foundation push with an end-to-end proof of the three-beat Source to Shore chapter and the cleaner supporting surfaces.

execution_order.goal: Design the final proof checklist for the steady beta foundation wave.
execution_order.why_now: A large push should end with a clear pass/fail read, not just a stack of green focused tests.

execution_order.goal: Run the final Source to Shore full-arc proof, record results, and update docs or queue state as needed.
execution_order.why_now: The team needs a single source of truth on whether the beta chapter is now clean enough to build on.

execution_order.goal: Review the full-arc proof and either mark the wave complete or name the smallest remaining blockers.
execution_order.why_now: Director-scale work should finish with a steady handoff before another big content or systems wave begins.

completion_gate: The full three-beat Source to Shore chapter can be demonstrated from post-High-Pass station entry through filed chapter payoff.
Station, journal, atlas, map, route marker, support choice, filed-memory, and debug snapshots agree on the chapter state.
The final report records focused tests, build status, browser proof, and any remaining small follow-up items.
No next beta breadth packet is opened until blockers from this signoff are resolved or explicitly accepted.
guardrails: Signoff and proof only unless the scout identifies a tiny blocker fix.
Do not add new route beats or new systems during signoff.
Do not hide known issues by moving them out of the queue.
Record concrete dates, commands, artifacts, and remaining risk.
Prefer a short blocker list over another broad follow-up wave.
post_packet_path: The clean signoff closes Source to Shore as a three-beat beta endpoint for now; do not add a fourth beat in this runway.
Next lane-1 work should move into behavior-preserving systems independence and travel-framing runway tasks from packet `176`.

gate_status.promote_main_456_when: All packet `168` through `174` critic gates are clean.

required_surface_matrix: station routes board and season wrap
field atlas logged history and filed payoff
world map focus, replay label, and route-marker target
verification_plan: `npm test -- --run src/test/field-season-board.test.ts src/test/field-requests.test.ts src/test/field-request-controller.test.ts src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts src/test/save-snapshots.test.ts -t 'Source to Shore|High Pass|Source Shelter|Forest Release|Dune Catch|route-marker|journal|debug save snapshots|field station'`
`npm run alpha:rc` if the prior checks pass and no blocker remains
browser_proof_plan: Use a fresh folder such as `output/lane-1-main-456-full-arc/`.
Capture post-High-Pass active Source Shelter station board.
Capture Source Shelter ready-to-file station board.
Capture filed Source to Shore station board.
Capture one active Source to Shore world-map frame with route-marker support selected.
Capture one final filed world-map frame with no active outing or marker.
Capture in-field Source Shelter, Forest Release, and Coastal Catch frames after spatial polish.
Pair screenshots with `render_game_to_text()` JSON/state captures and an empty browser-errors file.
report_contract: Include a gate table for packets `168` through `174`.
Record exact command results, dates, browser artifact paths, and the `alpha:rc` archive path if run.
Include a pass/fail matrix for the debug-save spine.
If any proof fails, open the smallest explicit blocker item instead of a broad new wave.

verification: npm test -- --run src/test/field-season-board.test.ts src/test/field-requests.test.ts src/test/field-request-controller.test.ts src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts src/test/save-snapshots.test.ts -t 'Source to Shore|High Pass|Source Shelter|Forest Release|Dune Catch|route-marker|journal|debug save snapshots|field station'
main_signoff.handoff: Promote `ECO-20260428-critic-456` to review the final signoff report and proof folder.

critic_review.decision: Mark packet `175` done and promote `ECO-20260428-scout-457`; do not add a fourth Source to Shore beat in this runway.
